query: SELECT p.id, p.name, p.value, p.capexGrade, p.priority, p.sector, cpm.matchScore, cpm.matchReason FROM collateralProjectMatches cpm JOIN projects p ON cpm.projectId = p.id JOIN collateralItems ci ON cpm.collateralId = ci.id WHERE ci.name LIKE '%XAVS1800%' AND p.value NOT IN ('Unknown', 'Undisclosed', 'Unspecified', 'Not specified') AND p.value NOT LIKE '%Confidential%' ORDER BY cpm.matchScore DESC LIMIT 20
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute SELECT p.id, p.name, p.value, p.capexGrade, p.priority, p.sector, cpm.matchScore, cpm.matchReason FROM collateralProjectMatches cpm JOIN projects p ON cpm.projectId = p.id JOIN collateralItems ci ON cpm.collateralId = ci.id WHERE ci.name LIKE '%XAVS1800%' AND p.value NOT IN ('Unknown', 'Undisclosed', 'Unspecified', 'Not specified') AND p.value NOT LIKE '%Confidential%' ORDER BY cpm.matchScore DESC LIMIT 20
